entity.summary: MegaETH concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange based on Uniswap V3-style pools, providing active token swaps and liquidity positions through the Prism trading application.
entity.notes: HEI models the Prism application, V3 factory, pools, and concentrated-liquidity positions as one DEX entity. No exact public launch marker is assigned in this batch.

evidence.title: Prism DEX official swap application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes MegaETH token swaps and wallet-connected trading through the Prism interface.

evidence.title: Prism DEX protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol profile identifies Prism DEX as a MegaETH concentrated-liquidity DEX and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and spot volume.
